differential_diagnoses: Progressive multifocal leukoencephalopathy (PML) - granule cell neuronopathy (GCN) variant
CNS relapse of diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (leptomeningeal/meningeal infiltration)
next_steps: Perform PCR testing of cerebrospinal fluid for JC virus, VZV, HSV, HHV-6, and enterovirus
Order paraneoplastic antibody panel (blood and CSF)
Consult neurology, neuro-oncology, and infectious disease
Perform repeat lumbar puncture for cytology, flow cytometry, and Epstein-Barr virus PCR
Consider stereotactic brain biopsy of the cerebellar lesions if initial workup is non-diagnostic
Continue broad-spectrum antiviral and antibiotic coverage until specific pathogen is identified
Continue supportive care including dysphagia evaluation and physical therapy
